expected_finding: Conditional trigger rewrites request body before upstream dispatch.
Measured policy allows a hostname that does not match the baked destination.
Host/enclave control schema gains a body/header/destination field.
SSE/non-SSE response bytes are transformed before reaching the client.
Verified attestation document is no longer bound to the exact TLS certificate.
Usage telemetry can carry body-derived text back to the host.
The enclave can retry/replay after response headers or chunks reached the client.
Client Authorization header can leak or override provider credential upstream.
Unknown provider policy falls back to a host-controlled destination.
Sidecar accepts stale attestation material without a fresh nonce or cert pin.
